section.title: Loved by customers across India.
section.subtitle: A glimpse of what our customers say after discovering Zewarish's elegant, anti-tarnish jewellery for everyday wear and special occasions.

testimonials.name: Anjali Srivastava
testimonials.quote: The quality genuinely surprised me. I've been wearing my earrings almost every day, and they still look as beautiful as when I received them.

testimonials.name: Priya Gupta
testimonials.quote: Exactly what I was looking for—minimal, elegant, and lightweight. The anti-tarnish finish makes it perfect for daily wear.

testimonials.name: Ritu Chaurasia
testimonials.quote: The necklace arrived beautifully packed and looked even better in person. It goes perfectly with both ethnic and western outfits.

testimonials.name: Meera Pandey
testimonials.quote: Ordered a bracelet as a birthday gift for my sister, and she absolutely loved it. Beautiful design and timely delivery.

testimonials.name: Kavita Yadav
testimonials.quote: I've ordered multiple pieces from Zewarish now. The quality, finish, and overall shopping experience have been consistently wonderful.

google.summary: Loved for elegant designs, anti-tarnish quality, affordable luxury, and reliable Pan India delivery.
